queries.question: Show all the autobiographies and just those historical accounts that are from the 20th century.
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.Title 
FROM Books
WHERE Books.Narrative_Form = "Autobiography" OR Books.Narrative_Form = "Historical Account" AND Books.Epoch = "20th Century"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?books a :Book .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?books p:Narrative_Form ?narrative_form_w .
  ?books p:Narrative_Form ?narrative_form_w2 .
  ?books p:Epoch ?epoch_w .
  FILTER((STR(?narrative_form_w) = "Autobiography" || (STR(?narrative_form_w2) = "Historical Account" && STR(?epoch_w) = "20th Century")))
}

queries.question: Show any autobiographies or historical accounts where either is from the 20th century.
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.Title 
FROM Books
WHERE (Books.Narrative_Form = "Autobiography" OR Books.Narrative_Form = "Historical Account") AND Books.Epoch = "20th Century"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?books a :Book .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?books p:Narrative_Form ?narrative_form_w .
  ?books p:Narrative_Form ?narrative_form_w2 .
  ?books p:Epoch ?epoch_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?narrative_form_w) = "Autobiography" || STR(?narrative_form_w2) = "Historical Account")) && STR(?epoch_w) = "20th Century"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all autobiographies and historical accounts from the 20th century.
